REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF CHI CHI BEIGNET INC DOING BUSINESS AS BISCUITS NOTICE OF MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF THE COURTS ORDER OF SEPTEMBER 3, 2019 DENYING INJUNCTIVE RELIEF PURSUANT TO CCP 1008 IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 20, 2019. BY NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 31, 2019 PLAINTIFF TO FILE A MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT TO ADD ALLEGATIONS RE: FREEZER AND CALENDAR THE HEARING FOR DECEMBER 3, 2019. IF MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND IS GRANTED, AMENDED COMPLAINT TO BE FILED AND SERVED ON DECEMBER 3, 2019; DEFENDANT TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION TO THIS MOTION NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 10, 2019; PLAINTIFF TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL REPLY NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 16, 2019. SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFS SHALL BE LIMITED TO ISSUE RE: FREEZER. IF PLAINTIFF CHOOSES NOT TO SEEK LEAVE TO AMEND, PLAINTIFF MAY APPEAR EX-PARTE ON ANY DATE AFTER OCTOBER 31, 2019 (EXCEPT TUESDAYS) TO SEEK TO ADVANCE THE HEARING ON THIS MOTION. THE COURT IS CURRENTLY INCLINED TO DENY PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S ASSERTIONS THAT BUILDING'S PLUMBING (UNDER DEFENDANT'S FLOOR AND ABOVE PLAINTIFF'S CEILING) MUST BE REPAIRED BY THE DEFENDANTS. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF CHI CHI BEIGNET INC DOING BUSINESS AS BISCUITS Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of The Courts Order Of September 3, 2019 Denying Injunctive Relief Pursuant To Ccp 1008 is continued to December 20, 2019. By no later than October 31, 2019 Plaintiff to file a motion for leave to amend complaint to add allegations re: freezer and calendar the hearing for December 3, 2019. If motion for leave to amend is granted, amended complaint to be filed and served on December 3, 2019; Defendant to file supplemental opposition to this motion no later than December 10, 2019; Plaintiff to file supplemental reply no later than December 16, 2019. Supplemental briefs shall be limited to issue re: freezer. If Plaintiff chooses not to seek leave to amend, Plaintiff may appear ex-parte on any date after October 31, 2019 (except Tuesdays) to seek to advance the hearing on this motion. The Court is currently inclined to deny Preliminary Injunction based on Plaintiff's assertions that building's plumbing (under Defendant's floor and above Plaintiff's ceiling) must be repaired by the Defendants.
